enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Raja Raja Chozhan Naan expresses deep feelings of love and devotion, celebrating the beauty of romantic relationships.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Rettai Vaal Kuruvi, this song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the protagonist's feelings for their beloved.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by the legendary KJ Yesudas and composed by the iconic Ilaiyaraaja.

When was the song released?

Raja Raja Chozhan Naan was released on February 27, 1987.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Raja Raja Chozhan Naan, the lyrics beautifully convey the emotions of love and longing, making it a perfect romantic ballad. The song's soothing melody and KJ Yesudas's captivating voice evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth. Set against the backdrop of Rettai Vaal Kuruvi, it highlights the protagonist's deep connection to their beloved. This classic piece remains a cherished favorite among fans of Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Raja Raja Chozhan Naan from Rettai Vaal Kuruvi is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and nostalgia. With the enchanting voice of KJ Yesudas and the masterful composition by Ilaiyaraaja, this song resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the magic of this classic that beautifully intertwines romance and emotion.
stanzaMeanings: I am the king Raja Raja Chozhan, you are the beloved of the land of love. (2) Flower, love is a fire.
Heaven has come to earth as a woman. Joy is here on this land.
I am the king Raja Raja Chozhan, you are the beloved of the land of love. Flower, love is a fire.
With eyes like camphor lamps, when hands meet, it shines like a star.
Joy is on the stage, singing praises of my love.
I am going to swing here. There, I am moving in desire.
Your melody is my love's vehicle. The red lotus is my rain, you are the goddess.
I am the king Raja Raja Chozhan, you are the beloved of the land of love. Flower, love is a fire.
The gaze that looks at the world is like a shining star. Without hesitation, the heart dances happily.
The arrow of the bow does not kill, but the eyes of a woman say it does.
The queen who closes the door is in the palace. My love's eyes will go in the palanquin.
The honey river flows at the right time. The river's flow will not stop, listen to the golden sound, oh queen.
I am the king Raja Raja Chozhan, you are the beloved of the land of love. Flower, love is a fire.
I am the king Raja Raja Chozhan, you are the beloved of the land of love. Flower, love is a fire.
Heaven has come to earth as a woman. Joy is here on this land.
I am the king Raja Raja Chozhan, you are the beloved of the land of love. Flower, love is a fire.
